overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player character moves steadily from a narrow industrial service alley onto a wide city sidewalk, passing modern street lamps and palm trees with a massive glass megabuilding dominating the distant skyline. The scene features warm golden-hour lighting, cyberpunk architecture, and sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service alley with drainage canal

events.description: exiting narrow industrial alley into open urban boulevard with view of distant megabuilding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow industrial corridor between red-trimmed building and dark metal wall

entered.detail: multi-story industrial structure with distinctive red structural beams and metal facade
elevated walkway bridge with red railings spanning across the alleyway
tall dark metal wall with vertical paneling running alongside the walkway
deep concrete channel running parallel to the walkway on the left side
large industrial air conditioning units mounted on the roof of the right building

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial service alley flanked by a red-trimmed building on the left and a dark metal wall on the right. The camera moves forward past a concrete drainage canal, with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible ahead. Toward the end of the segment, the view opens up to reveal palm trees and a massive glass megabuilding in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban boulevard sidewalk with megabuilding vista

agents.ego_description: walking along open sidewalk with palm trees and modern street lamps passing by on the left

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with glass facade dominating the skyline ahead
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
futuristic street lamps with horizontal light bars mounted on black poles

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban boulevard with the dark industrial wall still running along the right side. The massive glass megabuilding grows larger in the center view as the camera advances. Palm trees and modern street lamps line the left side of the street, and sparse vehicle traffic is visible on the road. The lighting remains warm and directional, casting long shadows across the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street approach with debris and pedestrian traffic

events.description: cardboard boxes and debris appear scattered on the sidewalk
pedestrian enters frame walking toward camera

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along sidewalk approaching a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: scattered cardboard boxes and trash accumulated along the base of the wall
concrete and metal barriers separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment features an approach toward a street intersection with traffic barriers visible on the left. Cardboard debris lies scattered along the right sidewalk near the dark industrial wall. A pedestrian appears walking toward the camera in the center of the frame. The megabuilding looms larger in the background, and the warm morning light continues to illuminate the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined industrial alleyway that gradually opens into a wide, sun-drenched cyberpunk boulevard. It begins by moving forward through a narrow passage flanked by a red-trimmed building and a dark metal wall, passing a concrete drainage canal beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. As the camera exits the alley, the view expands to reveal a broad urban street lined with palm trees and modern lamps, while a massive glass megabuilding grows larger in the center of the frame. The scene then advances along the concrete sidewalk under warm, directional morning light, passing sparse vehicle traffic and scattered cardboard debris. Finally, the camera approaches a street intersection marked by traffic barriers as a lone pedestrian walks toward the viewer against the backdrop of the looming megabuilding.
